apps.name: GameVault
apps.subtitle: Your self-hosted game library
apps.localizedDescription:
A native iOS companion for your self-hosted GameVault server.

Track your game library — Now Playing, Completed, and Backlog — with full sync to your GameVault server. All your data stays on your own server; the app is just a native client.

Features:
• Dashboard with stats, hours played, platform & genre breakdown
• Now Playing, Completed, and Backlog tabs
• Search & add games from the RAWG.io database (500k+ titles)
• Edit ratings, hours, reviews, and notes
• Two-factor authentication (TOTP + email OTP)
• Liquid Glass design for iOS 17+

privacy.NSAllowsLocalNetworking: Required to connect to your self-hosted GameVault server on your local network
